name: 12 fl oz Halloween Figural Pumpkin Tumbler - Hyde and EEK! Boutique™
description:
Enjoy refreshing drinks in fun seasonal style with the Halloween Figural Pumpkin Tumbler from Hyde and EEK! Boutique™. This figural tumbler is designed in the shape of a pumpkin with a green stem plus eyes, nose and mouth detailing in black. Plus, it also comes with an orange-and-black straw for convenient sipping. Made of plastic, this BPA-free tumbler is suitable for cold beverages only and can be tossed in the top rack of the dishwasher to clean.

Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Thrilling delights. Curious oddities.
